page: Microsoft Azure D160ads_v7 is a general-purpose server from the Dadsv7 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with x86_64 architecture. It features 160 dedicated virtual CPUs across 80 physical cores with multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 640.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It includes 9449 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, this server demonstrates top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 14521.33 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 464.15 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The processor's instruction set, which includes AVX-512 and cryptography extensions like AES and SHA_NI, supports high-throughput operations. This is reflected in its top-tier Passmark CPU score of 145385.56 and database operations score of 41388.04.

The combination of high-density compute resources, massive local storage, and a balanced memory-to-core ratio makes this instance highly cost-efficient for resource-intensive deployments. It is well-suited for large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, and local data processing. Benchmark results show exceptional performance in Redis SET operations at 204.26 million operations per second and static web serving at 111.28 GB/sec. Additionally, the server is capable of handling large-scale LLM inference workloads, achieving 73.9 tokens per second for medium-sized models and 8.92 tokens per second for large models during text generation.
description: Microsoft Azure D160ads_v7 is a high-capacity general-purpose server from the Dadsv7 family, utilizing an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 160 dedicated vCPUs and 640.0 GB of RAM. Operating at 4.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this instance includes 9449 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmark data places this server in the top 10% for single-core and multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations. It excels in high-throughput scenarios, delivering 204.26 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and 111.28 GB/sec in static web serving. Lacking dedicated GPU hardware, it relies on its robust CPU architecture to handle demanding workloads. This server is optimized for large-scale databases, intensive data processing, and enterprise-grade web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D160ads_v7 is a general-purpose server featuring 160 vCPUs, 640 GB RAM, and 9449 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier CPU and database performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D160ads_v7 is a general-purpose server with 160 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 640 GB RAM, and 9449 GB local storage for high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity x86 platform combining 160 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs with massive local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 160 dedicated vCPUs and 640.0 GB RAM.
Includes 9449 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Delivers top-tier performance in multi-core CPU and database benchmarks.
Achieves high-throughput web serving at 111.28 GB/sec and rapid Redis operations.
Optimized for large-scale databases, data processing, and enterprise web applications.
